title: centaurea scabiosa
intro: Centaurea scabiosa, also known as scabious, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family that grows wild in many parts of the world, particularly in dry areas with well-drained soil. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of centaurea scabiosa include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce swelling, and promote wound healing. Centaurea scabiosa can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used topically to treat minor skin issues and promote overall skin health.
